recommendations.title: 3 Hearts
recommendations.overview: A twist of fate leaves a hapless accountant romantically torn between two sisters.

recommendations.title: Farewell, My Queen
recommendations.overview: A look at the relationship between Marie Antoinette and one of her readers during the final days of the French Revolution.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Chambermaid
recommendations.overview: In the late 19th century, a chambermaid from Paris relocates to a remote household in Provence, engages in trysts and finds herself enraptured with a coach driver.

recommendations.title: The Lives of Others
recommendations.overview: In 1984 East Berlin, dedicated Stasi officer Gerd Wiesler begins spying on a famous playwright and his actress-lover Christa-Maria. Wiesler becomes unexpectedly sympathetic to the couple, and faces conflicting loyalties when his superior takes a liki

recommendations.title: Macadam Stories
recommendations.overview: Improbable encounters bring tenderness, laughter and compassion to a world of urban alienation.

recommendations.title: The Virgin Suicides
recommendations.overview: A group of male friends become obsessed with five mysterious sisters who are sheltered by their strict, religious parents.

recommendations.title: The Piano Teacher
recommendations.overview: Erika Kohut, a sexually repressed piano teacher living with her domineering mother, meets a young man who starts romantically pursuing her.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Clara
recommendations.overview: An astronomer becomes obsessed with searching the cosmos for signs of life beyond Earth which leads to a shocking discovery.

recommendations.title: Tabu
recommendations.overview: Lisbon, Portugal, 2010. Pilar, a pious woman devoted to social causes, maintains a peculiar relationship with her neighbor Aurora, a temperamental old woman obsessed with gambling who lives tormented by a mysterious past.
